text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, the day of the Yasuda Kinen
arrives accompanied by sheets of heavy rain.

With the track in disarray, the spectators air their
concerns—perhaps even a runner like Taiki
Shuttle will struggle to win in these conditions.

However, Taiki sets her fighting spirit aflame,
refusing to give in to the rain.

Taking the bad weather in stride, she's ready to
thrill the crowd with a powerful performance!
